raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find command. Recursively list directories containing *.out. Use find /system -type f -name '*.out' -printf '%h\n' | sort -u. Or use find /system -type f -name '*.out' -exec dirname {} \; | sort -u. Output directories. So command: find /system -type f -name '*.out' -printf '%h\n' | sort -u.
